name: Baked Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pork chops with melted butter in a large skillet.
2. Place them in a greased baking dish.
3. Put a thin slice of lemon on each chop.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Spread brown sugar over the chops.
6. Drizzle tomato sauce over the chops.
7. Cover and bake for 1 1/4 hours at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
